title: Agrostis azorica
taxonomy: Agrostis azorica is classified within the plant kingdom as a member of the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the tribe Poeae, a group of grasses that are typically found in temperate and subtropical regions. The genus Agrostis is a group of grasses that are native to the Northern Hemisphere, with Agrostis azorica being an endemic species found only in the Azores archipelago. This species is closely related to other Agrostis species, such as Agrostis canina and Agrostis stolonifera. Further classification within the Agrostis genus may involve examination of its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogeny.
